description: CDK app containing backend logic and services

EXECUTE_API_ENDPOINT_ENABLED.description: Enable execute-api endpoint for API Gateway

NHS_API_PLATFORM_BASE_URL.description: Base URL for NHS API Platform

NHS_API_PLATFORM_API_KEY_SECRET_NAME.description: The secret name that stores NHS API Platform API key

NHS_API_PLATFORM_KEY_ID.description: The key ID of the private key for NHS API Platform

NHS_API_PLATFORM_APPLICATION_ID_SECRET_N.description: The secret name that stores NHS API Platform application ID

NOTIFY_ROUTING_PLAN_ID_MAP.description: Map of routing plan IDs for Notify

NOTIFY_JWT_EXPIRATION_TIME_SECONDS.description: JWT expiration time in seconds for Notify

NOTIFY_DB_COMMUNICATION_LOGS_TTL_DAYS.description: TTL (in days) for Notify db logs

NOTIFY_CALLBACK_API_KEY_ID.description: API key ID for Notify callback API

NOTIFY_CALLBACK_API_KEY_SECRET_NAME.description: The secret name that stores Notify callback API key

NUDGE_INITIAL_AFTER_START_SCHEDULE.description: Cron schedule for initial nudge after start

NUDGE_INITIAL_AFTER_START_TEMPLATE.description: Template name for initial nudge after start

NUDGE_INITIAL_AFTER_START_CRITERIA_NUMBE.description: Number of days criteria for initial nudge after start

NHS_LOGIN_BASE_ENDPOINT_URL.description: Base endpoint URL for NHS Login

NHS_LOGIN_PRIVATE_KEY_SECRET_NAME.description: The secret name that stores NHS Login private key

AWS_NOTIFY_CALLBACK_API_DOMAIN_NAME.description: Domain name for Notify callback API

SNS_KMS_KEY_ALIAS_NAME.description: KMS key alias name for SNS encryption

ENABLE_REPORTING_DATA_COPY.description: Enable copying data to reporting database

ENABLE_REPORTING_EXTERNAL_INTEGRATIONS.description: Enable external integrations for reporting (requires ENABLE_REPORTING_DATA_COPY=true)

AUTO_EXPIRE_AFTER_DAYS.description: Number of days to auto-expire health checks

NO_LAB_RESULT_AUTO_WRITEBACK_AFTER_DAYS.description: Number of days to auto-writeback for health checks without lab results

NO_LAB_RESULT_AUTO_EXPIRE_AFTER_DAYS.description: Number of days to auto-expire health checks without lab results

NO_LAB_RESULT_FINAL_AUTO_EXPIRE_AFTER_DA.description: Number of days for final expiry of health checks without lab results

LOG_RETENTION_IN_DAYS.description: CloudWatch logs retention period in days

CSOC_LOG_FORWARDING_ENABLED.description: Enable log forwarding to CSOC (Cyber Security Operations Centre)

CSOC_EVENT_BUS_ARN.description: EventBridge event bus ARN for CSOC log forwarding

AWS_XRAY_CONTEXT_MISSING.description: X-Ray context missing behavior for tracing

GP_UPDATE_SCHEDULE_INTERVAL_IN_HOURS.description: Interval in hours for GP update schedule

EVALUATOR_EXPORT_FILE_RETENTION_DAYS.description: Number of days to retain evaluator export

EVALUATOR_EXPORT_ROW_LIMIT.description: Maximum number of rows per evaluator export

EVALUATOR_EXPORT_DELETE_SERVER_AFTER_DAY.description: Number of days to delete evaluator export server

LAMBDA_MEMORY_SIZE.description: Default memory size in MB for Lambda functions

GP_NOTIFICATION_SMTP_ENABLE_SEND_CUSTOM_.description: Enable sending custom headers for GP notifications

RISK_API_KEY_SECRET_NAME.description: The secret name that stores the QRIsk API key

AUTH_REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRY_DURATION_MINUT.description: Expiry duration in minutes for refresh tokens
